name: ooda
description: Routes any decision, action, or iteration through John Boyd's real OODA loop — Observe (measure), Orient (the schwerpunkt: reframe against stale models — the highest-leverage step), Decide (one lever, as a hypothesis), Act (ship a test, re-observe), loop fast. Conditional UserPromptSubmit nudge on decide/act/iterate language + SessionStart primer. Boyd-faithful: not a 4-box speed circle; Orient dominates; tempo is rhythm not haste.
